revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''4-4-075

Cycle match (in Loran)

The comparison in time difference between corresponding radio frequency carrier cycles contained in the rise times of a master and a slave pulse.

The comparison is refined to a determination of the phase difference between these two cycles.

At present used in Loran C.

{{IALAFooter}}
